title: `Ananyah #6055
definition:
Ananiah = "Jehovah clouds"

 n pr m
 1) ancestor of Azariah who assisted in rebuilding the city wall in
    the time of Nehemiah

 n pr loc
 2) a city northwest of Jerusalem to which some Benjamite exiles returned
nasbUsage:

 n pr m
